title: pyrethrum trichophyllum
intro: Pyrethrum trichophyllum is a plant species in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains pyrethrins, which are compounds that have insecticidal and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum trichophyllum have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. Pyrethrum trichophyllum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
